title: The Interpretation of Cultures: Selected Essays
author: Clifford Geertz
themes: Religion and Ideology as Cultural Systems
rationale: The foundational text of interpretive anthropology and the single most important mid-century statement of symbolic anthropology. Geertz's concept of thick description reshaped ethnographic method across the social sciences and humanities. Includes the landmark Balinese cockfight essay. Chosen as the root book for cultural-studies.
